message: breakup ho gaya 3 saal baad, raat ko bohot miss karta hoon
NEET drop year hai Kota mein, mock score gir gaya parents gussa
saas roz kitchen pe comment karti hai, pati kuch nahi bolta
naukri chali gayi EMI aa rahi hai ghar pe kaise bolun
mummy har week rishta bhej rahi hai mujhe abhi ready nahi
interview se pehle haath kaamp rahe hain neend nahi aati
pata chala partner ne cheat kiya, forgive karun ya chhod dun
IT job se burnout ho gaya Sunday ko hi darr lagta hai
shaadi ke baad sasural mein rehna pad raha hai privacy zero
kuch samajh nahi aa raha life mein

thread: NEET second attempt fail mock low
